_meta.name: p2
_meta.parhelion_anchor_source: Phase 2 multi-photo calibration (h=18.6 deg, R22=182, dagger residuals -1/-1 px)
_meta.cza_anchor_source: Task #53 step 2 (2026-05-13): parabola-fit of CZA lower edge in y=[60,138] band, saturation > 22 threshold, 400 edge points across x=[367,767]

cza_apex_residual.note: Y-residual exceeds the 8 px / 0.04*R22 route threshold by ~2.4x. Route still cannot promote because of coverage gate (only p2 eligible: p7 above CZA cutoff, p13 cropped at low h).

r22_source_note: From Phase 2 multi-photo calibration. p2 is the clean modern halo display with a continuous, unambiguous 22-degree halo arc (image 1 label-key role). R22 is independent of the parhelion offsets. Pass B1 classification 2026-05-13; lever sec(h)-1 = 5.52 percent (eligible).
